name: Hornet - A well deserved rest
description:
"Do you mind if I join you for this well-deserved moment of rest?"

In the haunted halls of the Citadel, Hornet finds a well-deserved rest in some hot springs. However, she is not alone, as she finds you already enjoying the relaxing waters.

Intro 1: Stranger POV

Intro 2: Friend/Ally POV

Intro 3: Rival POV

Intro 4: Ball of fluff POV

I know I know, I said I would make the rest of the Primarchs once the Digital Circus bots were done, but I've been playing Silksong since it came out, and I just had to make at least one bot of such beautiful game... I'll do more, though.

✨

REQUESTS HERE

✨
creator: Olaqase
